# AI Context for @json-express/adapter-memory

An in-memory database adapter for rapid prototyping.

## Setup
```typescript
import { AdapterMemory } from '@json-express/adapter-memory';
kernel.registerAdapter(new AdapterMemory());
```

## AI Instruction
- Data is lost on restart. Do not use for production.
- Use `adapter-json` or Postgres if persistence is needed.
